prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-PRECSCREWDRIVESETBLU-10PC Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Tool 10pc Precision Screwdriver Bit Set Magnetic Holder Pocket Clip Description: Be prepared to make repairs on the go with the Universal Tool Precision Screwdriver Set.

This set comes with 10 screwdrivers that all fit neatly inside the handle for easy storage and transportation. The sizes included are: (5) Torx: T3, T4, T5, T6, T8; (1) Phillips: PH0; (1) Spanner: 2.6; (1) Triangle Size: 2.3; (1) Star: 0.8.

Since this set comes with such a variety of bit sizes, you'll be able to fix just about anything without having to dig out your whole set of tools. Teh bit holder handle is constructed of magnetic aluminum and features a pocket clip. Make sure you keep one of these on your person, in your car or in your travel bag just in case. Search Terms: screwdrivers precision tools and hardware hex bits drill Features: - Sizes Included: (5) Torx: T3, T4, T5, T6, T8; (1) Phillips: PH0; (1) Spanner: 2.6; (1) Triangle Size: 2.3; (1) Star: 0.8 - Precision Bits Constructed of Durable CRV Steel - Aluminum Magnetic Bit Holder Handle w/ Bit Storage - Pocket Clip for Easy Transporation - Color: Blue === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 10-pc Blue Precision Screwdriver Set

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 10-Pk Blue Precision Screwdriver Bit Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Magnetic Aluminum Handle, Pocket Clip, 5 Torx And Phillips Bits, CRV Steel, Portable Storage
